title: Mycaranthes brevicaulis
taxonomy: Mycaranthes brevicaulis is a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This species is classified as a genus within the subtribe Aeridinae of the tribe Epidendroideae. The subtribe Aeridinae is part of the orchid family that is native to tropical regions. Mycaranthes brevicaulis is often found in the tropical regions of Asia, where the climate supports the growth of orchids.
uses: Mycaranthes brevicaulis is a species of orchid, but specific information on its medicinal uses is not readily available.
